summary: Phase 44 - Customer Profile mandatory fields + GST verification testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: mandatory field markers, client-side validation, GST verification flow with 'Verifying GST...' button state, error surfacing to UI, and proper field styling.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend customer_router.py: Proper mandatory field validation (name, phone, gstin) with clear error messages
Backend gst_verify.py: Shared GST verification helper correctly calls Sandbox.co.in API
Backend: Conservative behavior - rejects when GST API returns valid but empty company name
Frontend CustomerAccountPage.js: All mandatory fields have red asterisks (*)
Frontend: Email field correctly shown as read-only with 'login identity' label
Frontend: Company Name field correctly shown as read-only with '· auto-filled from GST' helper
Frontend: GST input has font-mono uppercase styling
Frontend: Helper text 'Company Name will be auto-filled from the GST registry on save.' shown
Frontend: Save button changes to 'Verifying GST...' during save operation
Frontend: Client-side validation shows inline red error text for each invalid field
Frontend: Toast 'Please fix the highlighted fields' shown on validation failure
Frontend: Backend GST errors surfaced in toast AND pinned to gstin field inline
Frontend: 'Verified' badge with green ShieldCheck icon implemented (shows when gst_verified=true)
Public /api/gst/verify endpoint still works for supplier signup flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer profile mandatory fields + GST verification fully tested. Test GSTINs: 29AAACR5055K1Z2 (fails upstream with 'Invalid GSTIN pattern'), 27AAPFU0939F1ZV (returns valid:true but empty company - backend correctly rejects). To test successful GST verification with 'Verified' badge, need a real GSTIN that returns valid company name from Sandbox.co.in API.

backend_validation.all_missing_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 listing all missing fields
backend_validation.short_phone_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 'Phone must be at least 10 digits'
backend_validation.invalid_gstin_length_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 'Invalid GSTIN — must be 15 characters'
backend_validation.sandbox_api_called: PASS - Calls Sandbox.co.in for valid format GSTIN
backend_validation.empty_company_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 'Company Name could not be resolved from GST'
backend_validation.public_gst_verify_works: PASS - /api/gst/verify returns valid:true for valid GSTIN

frontend_ui.gstin_font_mono_uppercase: PASS - Input has font-mono uppercase classes
frontend_ui.gstin_helper_text: PASS - Shows 'Company Name will be auto-filled from the GST registry on save.'
frontend_ui.client_validation_empty_fields: PASS - Shows inline red errors + toast
frontend_ui.client_validation_short_phone: PASS - Shows 'Phone must be at least 10 digits'
frontend_ui.backend_error_surfaced: PASS - GST errors shown in toast AND inline on gstin field
frontend_ui.verified_badge_implemented: PASS - Code shows ShieldCheck icon with 'Verified' text when gst_verified=true
